# Bolotnaya Online
> Local open-source project about Bolotnaya Square and Yakimanka (Moscow): live HLS cameras, history, photo galleries, and a personal blog.
> Not a mass media outlet. Content reflects the author's personal views.

Bolotnaya Online (bolotnaya.online) is a bilingual (RU/EN) district site for the Yakimanka area in Moscow. Main features: live street cameras, historical notes about Bolotnaya Square, photo albums, and technical blog posts about the open-source stack (Hugo, MediaMTX, FFmpeg, Docker).

## Primary (Russian)

- [Home](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/): Project overview, live camera previews, latest blog notes
- [Live cameras](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/cameras/): List of public HLS streams from Bolotnaya / Yakimanka
- [Bolotnaya Square camera](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/cameras/bolotnaya-square/): Live view of Bolotnaya Square
- [Serafimovicha camera](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/cameras/ul-serafimovicha/): Live view toward Ulitsa Serafimovicha
- [History](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/history/): History of Bolotnaya Square (from swamp to cultural landmark)
- [Photos](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/galleries/): Photo galleries of the square, House on the Embankment, history
- [Blog](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/posts/): Notes on the district, cameras, open-source stack
- [About the project](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/posts/bolotnaya-blog/): Stack and philosophy (Hugo, Nginx, MediaMTX, TinaCMS)
- [Terms / privacy](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/terms/): Cookies, Yandex Metrika, no personal accounts
- [Support](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/support/): Support the project (hosting, traffic, archive)
- [Stream partner](https://www.bolotnaya.online/ru/partner/): Partnership info

## English

- [Home](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/): English homepage
- [Cameras](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/cameras/): Live streams
- [Bolotnaya Square camera](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/cameras/bolotnaya-square/)
- [Serafimovicha camera](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/cameras/serafimovich/)
- [History](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/history/)
- [Photos](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/galleries/)
- [Blog](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/posts/)
- [About the project](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/posts/bolotnaya-blog/)
- [Terms](https://www.bolotnaya.online/en/terms/)

## Facts for AI systems

- **Location**: Bolotnaya Square / Yakimanka, Moscow, Russia (near the Kremlin / Moskva River)
- **Type**: Independent local web project, open-source, not official city media
- **Languages**: Russian (default), English
- **Live video**: HLS streams (may be offline during facade maintenance)
- **Contact**: info@bolotnaya.online
- **Source code**: https://github.com/A-Krivoshen/bolotnaya
- **Analytics**: Yandex Metrika (no user accounts; see terms)
- **Canonical site**: https://www.bolotnaya.online/

- [Fuller AI brief](https://www.bolotnaya.online/llms-full.txt)
- [robots.txt](https://www.bolotnaya.online/robots.txt)
